category_sources: Official MikMod homepage describes a module player and library supporting MOD, S3M, IT, and XM formats.
source_facts.description says libmikmod is a portable sound library.
display_name_sources: Official MikMod documentation section names libmikmod3 and libmikmod2 documentation.
docs_sources: Official MikMod homepage links online documentation for libmikmod3 latest version 3.3.13.
source_facts.homepage is the official MikMod homepage.
repo_sources: Official MikMod homepage says libmikmod and mikmod sources are available from the new SourceForge Git repository.
tags_sources: Official homepage lists supported module formats including mod, s3m, it, and xm.
source_facts.description identifies a portable sound library.
